task:
/home/user/Documents/planar_cloud.ply is an ASCII PLY with 1000 points approximately lying on the plane z=0.5 (with small noise).

Fit a best-fit plane primitive to the cloud (the fit yields a rectangular plane mesh) and export only the fitted plane entity as a PLY mesh at /home/user/Documents/fitted_plane.ply. Do not export the original cloud. The output must be a mesh (contain faces) and every vertex's Z coordinate must lie within [0.2, 0.8].
